headline: Electrical Systems Stocks Q4 Recap: Benchmarking Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB)
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how electrical systems stocks fared in Q4, starting with Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB).
